response.justification: The candidate has extensive senior-level experience but lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill with no project context, German proficiency is only basic (not meeting the required fluency), and the resume reflects senior/lead roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and team integration.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical workshops
Extensive exposure to agile practices, CI/CD, and modern architectures
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is required for client collaboration
Overqualified with senior titles and responsibilities, mismatched for entry-level role
Java experience is listed but not demonstrated in any project or context
